query:
INSERT INTO channels (name, slug, description, status, language, contentRating, feedPath) VALUES
('RILAN Shorts TV', 'shorts-tv', 'Short-form video content for all audiences', 'active', 'en', 'all', '/api/roku/feed/shorts-tv.json'),
('RILAN Kids TV', 'kids-tv', 'Family-friendly content for children', 'active', 'en', 'kids', '/api/roku/feed/kids-tv.json'),
('RILAN Food TV', 'food-tv', 'Cooking shows, recipes, and food culture', 'active', 'en', 'all', '/api/roku/feed/food-tv.json'),
('RILAN Travel TV', 'travel-tv', 'Travel documentaries and destination guides', 'draft', 'en', 'all', '/api/roku/feed/travel-tv.json');

INSERT INTO categories (name, slug, description) VALUES
('Latest', 'latest', 'Most recently added content'),
('Featured', 'featured', 'Editor picks and featured content'),
('Popular', 'popular', 'Most watched content'),
('Kids Favorites', 'kids-favorites', 'Top picks for children'),
('Cooking Basics', 'cooking-basics', 'Beginner-friendly cooking content'),
('World Cuisines', 'world-cuisines', 'International food and recipes'),
('Adventure Travel', 'adventure-travel', 'Extreme and adventure travel'),
('City Guides', 'city-guides', 'Urban travel and city exploration');

INSERT INTO videos (title, slug, description, thumbnailUrl, streamUrl, durationSeconds, language, contentType, contentRating, releaseDate, rightsOwner, publishStatus, validationStatus) VALUES
('Alphabet Song', 'alphabet-song', 'Fun alphabet learning for kids', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503676260728-1c00da094a0b?w=800', 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/BigBuckBunny.mp4', 320, 'en', 'clip', 'kids', '2024-01-15', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'published', 'valid'),
('Numbers 1-10', 'numbers-1-10', 'Learning numbers for young children', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1509228468518-180dd4864904?w=800', 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/ElephantsDream.mp4', 280, 'en', 'clip', 'kids', '2024-01-20', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'published', 'valid'),
('Animal Sounds', 'animal-sounds', 'Learn animal sounds with fun animations', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1474511320723-9a56873867b5?w=800', 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/ForBiggerBlazes.mp4', 240, 'en', 'clip', 'kids', '2024-02-01', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'published', 'valid'),
('Quick Pasta Recipe', 'quick-pasta-recipe', '15-minute pasta for busy weeknights', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555949258-eb67b1ef0ceb?w=800', 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/ForBiggerEscapes.mp4', 900, 'en', 'clip', 'all', '2024-02-10', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'published', 'valid'),
('Sushi Making 101', 'sushi-making-101', 'Master the art of sushi rolling at home', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1553621042-f6e147245754?w=800', 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/ForBiggerFun.mp4', 1200, 'en', 'clip', 'all', '2024-02-15', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'published', 'valid'),
('Paris in 48 Hours', 'paris-48-hours', 'The ultimate Paris travel guide', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502602898657-3e91760cbb34?w=800', 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/ForBiggerJoyrides.mp4', 1800, 'en', 'clip', 'all', '2024-03-01', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'published', 'valid'),
('Tokyo Street Food Tour', 'tokyo-street-food', 'Exploring the best street food in Tokyo', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540959733332-eab4deabeeaf?w=800', 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/ForBiggerMeltdowns.mp4', 1500, 'en', 'clip', 'all', '2024-03-10', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'published', 'valid'),
('60-Second Life Hacks', '60-second-life-hacks', 'Quick tips to make life easier', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1484480974693-6ca0a78fb36b?w=800', 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/Sintel.mp4', 60, 'en', 'short', 'all', '2024-03-15', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'published', 'valid'),
('Morning Yoga Routine', 'morning-yoga', 'Start your day with 10 minutes of yoga', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506126613408-eca07ce68773?w=800', 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/SubaruOutbackOnStreetAndDirt.mp4', 600, 'en', 'clip', 'all', '2024-03-20', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'draft', 'unchecked'),
('Draft Video - No Thumbnail', 'draft-no-thumb', 'This video is missing a thumbnail', NULL, 'https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/TearsOfSteel.mp4', 400, 'en', 'clip', 'all', '2024-03-25', 'RILAN GAMES LLC', 'draft', 'error');

-- Channel-Video assignments (channel 1 = shorts-tv, 2 = kids-tv, 3 = food-tv, 4 = travel-tv)
INSERT INTO channel_videos (channelId, videoId, featuredFlag, sortOrder) VALUES
(1, 8, true, 1),
(1, 9, false, 2),
(2, 1, true, 1),
(2, 2, false, 2),
(2, 3, false, 3),
(3, 4, true, 1),
(3, 5, false, 2),
(3, 7, false, 3),
(4, 6, true, 1),
(4, 7, false, 2);

-- Video-Category assignments
INSERT INTO video_categories (videoId, categoryId) VALUES
(1, 1), (1, 4),
(2, 1), (2, 4),
(3, 4),
(4, 1), (4, 5),
(5, 5), (5, 6),
(6, 1), (6, 7), (6, 8),
(7, 6), (7, 8),
(8, 1), (8, 2),
(9, 2);

-- Channel-Category rows
INSERT INTO channel_categories (channelId, categoryId, rowTitle, rowOrder, isVisible) VALUES
(1, 1, 'Latest Shorts', 1, true),
(1, 2, 'Featured', 2, true),
(2, 4, 'Kids Favorites', 1, true),
(2, 1, 'New Arrivals', 2, true),
(3, 5, 'Cooking Basics', 1, true),
(3, 6, 'World Cuisines', 2, true),
(3, 1, 'Latest Episodes', 3, true),
(4, 7, 'Adventure Travel', 1, true),
(4, 8, 'City Guides', 2, true);
